name: Velvet Chicken & Sweet Corn Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Boneless chicken breasts, cut into 1/4 inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 1/4 inch strips and pat dry on paper towels.
2. Mix the chicken with the egg-white marinade and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
3. Heat peanut oil in a saucepan or wok to between 280°F and 300°F (no hotter).
4. Deep-fry the chicken strips until they are barely tender, but do not brown them.
5. In a separate pot, heat the creamed corn with chicken stock and light soy sauce until hot.
6. Add the fried chicken and season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Garnish with sesame oil drops before serving.
